rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §25.0821 governs a minute of silence in schools to commemorate September 11, 2001. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: Sec. 25.0821. MINUTE OF SILENCE TO COMMEMORATE SEPTEMBER 11, 2001.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
